flags.title: Phishing attempt detected
flags.description: Suspicious email from 'seczure-verify.com' (misspelled domain) claiming unusual login from Nigeria with urgent credential harvesting attempt
flags.recommendation: Do NOT click the link. Forward to IT security team immediately and verify actual account status through official channels

flags.title: Live payment system failures

flags.recommendation: Approve rollback immediately to protect customer experience and revenue
